subcodes.first_line: O exalted branch of the Blessed Tree! Render thanks unto the Lord that thou art firm and steadfast in the Covenant and [3.5s]... ...O Lord! Grant me a measure of Thy grace and loving-kindness, Thy care and protection
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فرع رفیع سدره مبارکه شکر کن حضرت پروردگار را که ثابت و راسخ بر عهد و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @praise and encouragement, @predictions and prophecies
full_text_parts: O Lord!  Grant me a measure of Thy grace and loving-kindness, Thy care and protection, Thy shelter and bounty, that the end of my days may be distinguished above their beginning, and the close of my life may open the portals to Thy manifold blessings.  May Thy loving-kindness and bounty descend upon me at every moment, and Thy forgiveness and mercy be vouchsafed with every breath, until, beneath the sheltering shadow of Thine upraised Standard, I may at last repair to the Kingdom of the All-Praised.  Thou art the Bestower and the Ever-Loving, and Thou art, verily, the Lord of grace and bounty.
